verses.text: Nipi ni zingsang khuavak ma-in Magdala khuami Mary zong hanah va pai-in a et ciangin hankhuk kihukna suangtum a kilikkhia khin a mu hi
Amah zong tai-in Simon Peter leh Jesuh in a it a nungzuipa kiangah, “Amaute in hankhuk panin i Topa lakhia khin uh a, koi lai-ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin nungzui dang khatpa tawh Peter zong paikhia-in han lam a manawh uh hi
A nih tuakun taikhawm uh a, ahi zongin nungzui dang khatpa in Peter makhelhin hanah a tung masa hi
Hankhuk sung a etsuk ciangin a kitunna puante a om mu a, ahi zongin lutsuklo hi
Ama nungah Simon Peter hong tungin han sungah a lutsukpah hi. A luang tunna puan mu a
a lu tunna puan pen a luang tunna tawh omkhawm loin a tuamin a kizialin a om a mu hi
Tua ciangin han a tung masa nungzui dangpa zong lutsukin a thupiangte mu ahih manin a um hi
(Sihna panin thokik ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a genna thu a theithei nailo uh ahi hi
Tua ciangin nungzuite a inn uhah a ciah uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Magdala khuami Mary tungah Jesuh Kilang

verses.text: Ahi zongin han pualamah Mary kap a, a kahkawmin hankhuk sung lamah kunin en a
Jesuh' luang a kisialna a lu lamah khat, a khe lamah khat, puanpak silhin a tu vantung mi nih a mu hi
Tua vantung mite in Mary kiangah, “Bang hangin kap na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Amaute in ka Topa paikhiatpih uh a, koi lai-ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua khit ciangin a kihei leh Jesuh mu a, ahi zongin Jesuh ahihlam theilo hi

Jesuh in, “Numei aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Kua zong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Mary in huancingpa sa ahih manin, “Sia aw, amah na puakkhiat leh koi lai-ah koih na hi hiam hong gen in. A luang ka la nuam hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mary!” a cih leh Mary zong ama lamah kihei a, “Rabboni,” ci-in a dawng hi. (Rabboni pen Hebru pau hi a, “Siapa,” a cihna ahi hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei hong lenlen nawn kei in. Ka Pa kiangah a paito nailo ka hi hi. Ka sanggamte kiangah va pai in la, ‘Keima Pa leh note' Pa, keima Pasian leh note' Pasian' kiangah ka pai ding hi,’ ci hi, ci-in va gensak zaw in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin Magdala khuami Mary zong nungzuite kiangah pai-in Topa a muh khitna thu va gen a, hih a kam vaikhakte zong a zasak hi.

Tua ni pen Nipi ni nitak lam hi a, nungzuite zong a nitakin innsung khatah a kikhop laitakun Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin inn a kikalhnelh uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in amaute lakah Jesuh hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih hi
Tua bangin a hopih khit ciangin a khutte leh a pangpi zong a lak hi. Topa a muhna hangun nungzuite a nuam mahmah uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note in nopna ngah ta un. Pa in kei a hong sawl bangin note zong ka hong sawl hi,” ci-in a vaikhak leuleu hi
Tua khit ciangin amaute lamah a hu sang a, “Kha Siangtho na sang un
Mite' mawhna na maisak uh leh amaute' mawhna a mai hi ding a, na maisak kei uh leh amaute' mawhna a mailo hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
Nungzuite kiangah Jesuh a kilah laitakin sawmlenihte sung panin Unau Peeng minno a nei Thomas omlo hi

Tua ahih manin nungzui dangte in ama kiangah, “Topa ka mu uh hi,” a cih uh leh amah in, “A khut, siktukkilh tawh a kikilhna mate mu-in, tua a siktukkilh ma vangah ka khutmete ka va khum teek kei a, ama pangpi zong ka khut tawh ka lawn' teek kei leh ka um kei ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua zawh nipikal khat ciangin nungzuite zong innsung khatah kikhawm leuleu uh a, tua hunin Thomas zong a om hi. Amaute kong kikhaknelh uh hinapi-in Jesuh hong pai-in amaute lakah hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih khit ciangin
Thomas kiangah, “Na khutme tawh hong lawng in la ka khutte en in. Na khut zan in la ka pangpi zong lawng in. Umlah nawn kei in la, um taktak in,” a ci hi
Thomas in zong, “Ka Topa, ka Pasian!” ci-in a dawn' ciangin
Jesuh in, “Kei na hong muhkhit ciang bekin hong um pan na hi hiam? Kei hong mulo napi-in hong umte-a' dingin lungdamhuai mahmah zaw ding hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in a nungzuite' muhna-ah na lamdang lian tampi bawl a, ahi zongin hih laibu sungah a kigelhlo tampi tak omlai hi
Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute pen Jesuh, Pasian' Tapa, Khrih ahihna thu na uptheihna ding uh leh ama min hangin tua upna tawh nuntakna na ngahtheihna ding uh deihna tawh a kigelh ahi hi.
